title: Goa Waste  Management #GoaForGoodGovernance #ViksitGoa
description:
Clean Goa, Green Goa 🌿

From households to high-tech facilities, Goa is setting an example in smart waste management. Inspired by PM Narendra Modi’s Swachh Bharat Mission and led by CM Dr Pramod Sawant’s vision, the state is turning waste into a resource—responsibly and sustainably.

From composting in Saligao & Kakoda to scientific treatment in Kundai and safe disposal in Pishalem, every step counts toward a cleaner future.

Because cleanliness isn’t just a system—it’s a habit.
Let’s keep Goa leading. 💚#GoaForGoodGovernance #ViksitGoa
